title: A Successful Sponsorship at the Makati Medical Center's Rheumatology Postgraduate Course
excerpt: How I organized a sponsored coffee bar at a postgraduate medical course — and what it taught me about preparation, relationships, and showing up under pressure.

title: From Doctor's Clinics to n8n Workflows: My Unlikely Career Pivot
excerpt: What I learned selling pharmaceuticals to 50 doctors that made me a better automation engineer — and why the skills transfer more than you'd think.
